summary: DCR-NOTIF-001 passes all 5 hard gates; specific service named with environment and named individual owner, specific symptom with measurable characteristics and start time with date and time, scope declared as subset with description, observable signals documented with Datadog source and metric values, and recent changes explicitly documented as 'No changes in last 72h'.

warnings.description: The incident start time (14:22 UTC) is 13 minutes before the alert fired (14:35 UTC). This is accurate — the queue began growing before the alert threshold was crossed — but the 13-minute detection gap should be noted as a future improvement target for detection latency.
warnings.location: §3 Symptom Description — incident start time vs §5 Observable Signals — alert time
